name: Trust OCI Deployer CA
description: Downloads the deployer-managed CA certificate and installs it into the container's system trust store so apps (e.g. Gitea, which verifies the Zitadel discovery URL) trust internal HTTPS services signed by it. Runs as root before any OIDC configuration step that needs to reach the issuer over HTTPS.

parameters.name: Deployer URL
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: deployer base URL for CA download

parameters.name: VE Context
parameters.description: Auto-injected by backend: VE context key for CA download
